stemHtml: Two aircraft are flying the same route. Which of the following is correct regarding the wake turbulence experienced by the aircraft flying behind?

options.a: Vortices increase when the aeroplane in front slows down for approach but decrease when flaps are extended
options.b: Wake turbulence is greatest in the cruise when the speed is highest
options.c: Wake turbulence is greatest just before touchdown
options.d: Wake turbulence is worst just after take off with flaps extended
